name: Tiramisu- Olive Garden
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Brandy, Rum, or Your Favorite Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
Cream cheese or mascarpone should be at room temperature. Mascarpone is available at some Italian specialty food stores and some gourmet food stores.
1. Cut the sponge cake across the middle to form two disks, each about 1"-1-1/2 inches thick.
2. Blend the coffee or espresso and liqueur together.
3. Sprinkle the bottom half of the cake with the coffee liqueur blend, enough to flavor it strongly but not so much that it will collapse.
4. Mix the cream cheese or mascarpone with the sugar until completely dissolved and light and spreadable.
5. Spread half of the creamy mixture over the bottom half of the cake in a fairly thick layer.
6. Place the second half of the cake on top of the first and repeat the process, sprinkling the coffee liqueur blend and spreading the remaining cream cheese.
7. Coat the top layer of cream cheese completely with cocoa powder using a wire strainer.
8. Refrigerate the cake for at least two hours before cutting and serving.
